name: Tax Form OCR Capture Assistant
description: A tax-form OCR co-worker for structured intake review. Put tax form images, PDFs, answer files, or field-context tables in the input folder; it classifies forms, locates fields, captures taxpayer and line-item values, validates totals, and writes a review-only tax capture packet to the output folder.

document_folder.description: Local folder containing Synthesized IRS tax-form images with field-answer files.

output_folder.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

field_profile.description: Field names or extraction profile for this workflow.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: NIST Special Database 2 and NIST Special Database 6
example.provider: National Institute of Standards and Technology
example.license: NIST free reference data; review source terms before production use.
example.availability_note: Public NIST structured-form reference sets with simulated tax submissions, form images, and answer files.
example.download_hint: Download the Special Database 2 or 6 ZIP from NIST, then point document_sources.folder_path at an extracted submission folder.

input_folder.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

contract.summary: CPA firms, tax-prep software teams, payroll providers, banks, and agencies need local OCR for taxpayer identity and financial fields with fewer third-party data transfers.
users: CPA firms, tax-prep software vendors, payroll providers, banks, government agencies, and document capture teams.

dataset_input.name: NIST Special Database 2 and NIST Special Database 6
dataset_input.provider: National Institute of Standards and Technology
dataset_input.license: NIST free reference data; review source terms before production use.
dataset_input.availability_note: Public NIST structured-form reference sets with simulated tax submissions, form images, and answer files.
dataset_input.download_hint: Download the Special Database 2 or 6 ZIP from NIST, then point document_sources.folder_path at an extracted submission folder.

steps.label: Stage Tax Form Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the tax-form folder and NIST sample input notes.

steps.label: Extract Tax Form Text
steps.goal: Call shared llm_ocr_skill for tax form images and scanned forms, preserving page and OCR metadata.

steps.label: Classify & Locate Fields
steps.goal: Classify form faces and locate taxpayer, wage, deduction, credit, and total fields.

steps.label: Validate Tax Capture
steps.goal: Compare captured values to answer files when available and flag arithmetic or OCR issues.

steps.label: Write Tax Capture Packet
steps.goal: Write a review-only structured tax capture packet and validation checklist.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before extracted values are released to downstream systems or used for consequential decisions.

metadata.name: Tax Form OCR Capture Assistant
metadata.description: A tax-form OCR co-worker for structured intake review. Put tax form images, PDFs, answer files, or field-context tables in the input folder; it classifies forms, locates fields, captures taxpayer and line-item values, validates totals, and writes a review-only tax capture packet to the output folder.
metadata.agent_role: Local tax form OCR and structured capture team that prepares reviewable field maps without filing or advice claims.
metadata.target_users: CPA firms, tax-prep software vendors, payroll providers, banks, government agencies, and document capture teams.
metadata.customizable_for: Tax form classification, field location, OCR benchmarking, payroll form intake, bank tax packet review, and government form capture.
metadata.problem: CPA firms, tax-prep software teams, payroll providers, banks, and agencies need local OCR for taxpayer identity and financial fields with fewer third-party data transfers.

input_contract.description: CPA firms, tax-prep software teams, payroll providers, banks, and agencies need local OCR for taxpayer identity and financial fields with fewer third-party data transfers.

required_inputs.description: Local folder containing Synthesized IRS tax-form images with field-answer files.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

required_inputs.name: field_profile
required_inputs.description: Structured field names or extraction profile for this document workflow.

optional_inputs.description: Downloadable public dataset reference used for sample input selection.

optional_inputs.name: review_policy
optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

optional_inputs.name: input_folder
optional_inputs.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

mock.description: Uses the public dataset note and bundled text fixture when no local documents are selected.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

final_artifact.description: Review-only structured document automation packet with source evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

inputs.description: Resolved document folder, public dataset reference, and field extraction profile.

fields.description: Choose a local folder containing Synthesized IRS tax-form images with field-answer files.
